public_reputation: Known around Shirshal through day-to-day work as investigator.
appearance: Tazren Coilspire usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their investigator status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Pursues pattern, contradiction, and motive with a patient intensity that makes casual lies feel thin. In Shirshal, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of investigator in and around Shirshal, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shirshal workable through the obligations of investigator while managing the immediate pressure of magical law violations.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of investigator credible while absorbing the strain created by magical law violations.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tazren Coilspire can draw the party into a locality problem centered on investigator duties in Shirshal.
Tazren Coilspire becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with magical law violations around Shirshal.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Tazren Coilspire is immediately readable as a investigator tied to Shirshal.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shirshal: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Tazren Coilspire presents as someone shaped by the duties of a investigator and the daily pressures of Shirshal.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a investigator, and proof that strangers will not make Shirshal harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Tazren Coilspire refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a investigator too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can track causes, motives, and suppressed details that formal reports avoid.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Tazren Coilspire adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Tazren Coilspire always knows more about Shirshal than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a investigator in Shirshal.
